title: PACIFIC SCIENCE CENTER - Updated June 2026 - Yelp
content: There was a lot of friendly, kind and knowledgeable staff. Everything was clean and plenty of space to roam. The current Spider exhibit is a hit! So much to see

title: Pacific Science Center – Museum Review | Condé Nast Traveler
content: This museum is best experienced by visiting an immersive exhibit, interspersed with more restful moments in the planetarium or theater. There is seating

title: Pacific science center, worth it? : r/SeattleWA - Reddit
content: Seen so many mixed reviews. Smelly, dated, really neat, kids love it. Feels like it's priced like a damn amusement park. Dunno if it's improved since the reno
